title: [LowerTypes] Force type lowering of ref type operations to fix memtap type mismatch

features.name: unpacked array to packed array assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array (memory) being assigned to a packed array wire, where the element dimensions match but packing differs

features.name: bit-level concatenation to reconstruct packed array from unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a concatenation expression that reconstructs a packed array by accessing individual unpacked array elements in reverse order
